cleanup_hint.description: Exact non-interactive delete command. Use when a programmatic deletion exists.

cleanup_note.description: Free-form prose for manual-only systems or systems where deletion is the wrong action (e.g. long-lived named sandboxes that should be re-refreshed).

deploy_recipe.description: Bash snippet that prepares .sandbox-overlay/ with sandbox-specific config WITHOUT modifying tracked files. Run before any deploy command in the worktree.
